adjusted.reasoning: France heavy favourites but market (81%) is well below the model's 95% and the market track has out-predicted the model all tournament — anchored to the de-vigged consensus, trimmed France a further 2pp for the late Tchouameni loss (thigh, ruled out) with Thuram also doubtful. Paraguay's draw/pens path is real: they held Germany 1-1 over 120 minutes and won the shootout, and Diego Gomez returns from suspension; but they lost 30 extra minutes of legs, Alderete stays out, and Enciso/Avalos carry knocks while France cruised past Sweden 3-0 with Mbappe scoring twice. Beyond +/-10pp of the model on p_away, matching the documented market-anchoring calibration (cf. M086).

factors.factor: Tchouameni ruled out (thigh); Manu Kone to deputise; Thuram (calf) highly doubtful
Paraguay played 120 min + pens vs Germany (1-1, 4-3); Diego Gomez back from ban; Alderete (knee) out; Enciso/Avalos knocks
France 3-0 Sweden in R32 (Mbappe x2, Barcola) — full rest, no extra time

posted_to.note: Matchday bet, EP-max under the OLD (wrong) pens model (shootout = +1 goal).

Re-bet 0:1 -> 0:2 after correcting the after-pens EP model to the platform-verified rule (pens graded as 120' + shootout goals, so a 1-goal bet no longer auto-collects goal-diff/exact on shootouts). EP 2.48 (0:2) vs 2.43 (0:1) on adjusted 6/15/79. Pre-kickoff.

adjusted.reasoning: Morocco favourites but nowhere near the model's 65% — market has them ~53% and the market track is the better-calibrated signal. Set 56% (between, nearer market): Morocco's squad is fully fit and deeper, but they spent 120 minutes plus a shootout on Netherlands (Hakimi went the distance and missed a pen) while Canada won in regulation and get a broadly pro-host Houston crowd. Canada miss Ismael Kone (broken ankle) and Davies is only just back to minutes, which caps the upside of the fatigue edge. Under 2.5 goals is market-favoured — low-scoring Morocco win is the modal outcome. All probs within +/-10pp of model.

factors.factor: Market consensus MAR -125 / draw ~+255 / CAN +390 (de-vigged 20/27/53); under 2.5 favoured
Morocco injury-free (Riad back in training); Canada without Ismael Kone (broken ankle), Davies eased back via sub minutes
Morocco needed 120 min + pens vs Netherlands (1-1, 3-2, Saibari winning pen; Hakimi 120 min, missed pen); Canada beat RSA 1-0 in 90

posted_to.note: Matchday bet. EP-max on adjusted (18/26/56, market-anchored). Confirmed unchanged as EP-max after the after-pens grading fix (pens = 120' + shootout goals): EP 2.20 vs 0:2 1.95.
